lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you got any idea where Burthorpe is? The co- ordinator says I need to go there and paint all the leaves yellow, but I've never heard of that place!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Be careful when you pick mushrooms near the strange ruins to the south. Some of them will try to eat you!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Err, hello. Do you have any idea what a Winter Fairy actually does?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, no idea at all.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Oh, pity. Neither do I, but I'm supposed to be one this week.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Sorry, I can't talk I'm looking for Sarah-Jane!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Is your name Freddie, and are you loosing your teeth?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, no. I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Oh, right.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: You don't have any idea where I can find him do you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't know that either.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Oh, ok then. If you do find out please let me know. The co-ordinator has sent me to find him.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't stop to chat. I've just been told to get ready to go to Etceteria for some reason or other!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Picking mushrooms near the forge will probably end quite badly for you.

sections.title: In the Fairy Resistance Hideout before Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I don't want to go back! That orc tried to kill me!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: We must find a way to fight back! To throw those villains out of our homes.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I can't believe that there are orcs in Zanaris.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you heard? The Godfather has allowed orcs into Zanaris!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Those fairies that side with the Godfather are all traitors! The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you seen Fairy Cake? She went to talk to the Godfather and I haven't seen her since.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: How is the Queen? Has she woken up yet?

sections.title: In the Fairy Resistance Hideout after Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris! We shall over- throw the tyrant!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Is the council finished yet?

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Once the council of war is finished we shall go and get rid of the Godfather.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I'm so looking forward to going back home!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Thank you for waking our queen.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Now that the Queen is awake everything will be alright.
